cover_styles.name: 渐变科技
cover_styles.description: 蓝紫渐变、3D玻璃质感，适合科技产品/AI主题
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Gradient blue-purple colors, 3D glass morphism, tech conference style

cover_styles.name: 新闻报刊
cover_styles.description: 报纸版式、红黑配色，适合新闻资讯
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Newspaper layout style, red and black colors, bold typography

cover_styles.name: 笔记本涂鸦
cover_styles.description: 线圈本背景、彩色手写字，适合教程/攻略
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Notebook paper background with spiral binding, colorful hand-drawn text

cover_styles.name: 简笔涂鸦
cover_styles.description: 手绘简笔画、黄色高亮，适合小红书/教程类
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Hand-drawn sketch style, simple line art, yellow highlights

cover_styles.name: 暖色3D
cover_styles.description: 暖色调3D图标、渐变背景，适合设计教程/APP展示
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Warm pastel colors, 3D glossy icons, dark gradient background, elegant product showcase

cover_styles.name: 漫画黄
cover_styles.description: 简约漫画风、黄色背景，适合轻松话题/功能介绍
cover_styles.prompt_hint: Simple comic illustration style, yellow background, cute cartoon characters, casual tone
